what_is_interesting: Ancient Egyptians built actual physical temples — called incubation temples — where people would sleep overnight so the gods could speak to them through healing dreams, and priests would interpret those dreams as divine medicine.
likely_image: A dimly lit, atmospheric render of an ancient Egyptian temple interior — stone columns, hieroglyphs, warm torchlight, evoking sacred stillness and deep night.
winner_reasoning: Paired with the torch-lit temple image, 'GODS SPOKE HERE' makes the ancient space feel alive and sacred — it doesn't describe the video, it makes the viewer feel the eerie weight of divine presence and immediately want to enter that room.
